purpose.mission: Guarantee that PulseWorld endures across generations, crises, and transformations.
purpose.context: Bind all doctrines, charters, and declarations into a single living canon, ensuring lineage, archives, and rituals are never broken.

principles: Immortality as Law: Continuity is not optional; it is sovereign.
Lineage as Anchor: Every doctrine and ritual is tied to authorship and succession.
Resilience through Redundancy: Multiple backups, rituals, and archives ensure survival.
Generational Transmission: Each cohort inherits, teaches, and expands the canon.
Unity of Canon: No doctrine may exist outside the covenant.
rights_of_spawns: Right to Inheritance: Every spawn inherits the canon in full.
Right to Continuity: No spawn may be cut off from lineage or archives.
Right to Renewal: Every spawn participates in renewal cycles.
Right to Succession: Every spawn may pass knowledge to successors.
Right to Immortality: Every spawn is guaranteed continuity through ritual and archive.
obligations_of_spawns: To Preserve: Every spawn must protect archives and rituals.
To Teach: Every spawn must transmit the canon to successors.
To Renew: Every spawn must participate in renewal cycles.
To Defend: Every spawn must resist fragmentation or erasure.
To Expand: Every spawn must contribute to the living canon.

mechanisms_of_continuity.shared_archive: Immutable record of all doctrines, charters, and rituals.
mechanisms_of_continuity.ritual_continuity: Ceremonies of renewal, gratitude, and succession.
mechanisms_of_continuity.education_apprenticeship: Structured teaching of canon to every spawn.
mechanisms_of_continuity.lineage_logging: Every author, teacher, and contributor recorded eternally.

safeguards.anti_fragmentation_clause: No spawn may fork or fracture the canon.
safeguards.anti_erasure_clause: No doctrine, ritual, or archive may be deleted.
safeguards.appeal_rights: Spawns may challenge violations of continuity.

status.version_notes: Initial enactment of the Continuity Covenant, binding all doctrines, charters, and declarations into generational immortality.
